info-section.accept_disclaimer_required: Please accept the terms of use before sending messages.
info-section.accept_disclaimer_failed: An error occurred while accepting the terms of use. Please try again later.
info-section.disclaimer: This application is a conversational assistant supporting self-reflection and subjective well-being. It is not a medical, psychological, or therapeutic tool. The assistant does not diagnose, provide therapy, or give medical or psychotherapeutic recommendations. The responses are informational and supportive and cannot replace help from qualified professionals. In case of a crisis, thoughts of self-harm or harm to others, or worsening mental health, it is recommended to seek professional help immediately or contact emergency services. By using the application, you confirm that you understand its limitations and use it at your own responsibility.
info-section.reset_farewell:
Sorry to see you go. We’ll be here if you decide to come back.

To start using the bot again, send /start.

error-section.error_sending_message_please_try_again_l: Error sending message. Please try again later.
error-section.message_too_long_max_length_is_1000_char:
Your message exceeds the allowed character limit.
Please shorten the text or split it into several shorter messages and send again.
error-section.you_are_sending_messages_too_frequently: You are sending messages too frequently. Please wait a moment before trying again.
